content.text:
This looks correct. The slider surface now covers the full stage (well beyond 44x44px at all widths), sits above the SVG for hit-testing, and the small length-handle remains layered on top of it for its own drag area, so both controls stay independently operable.

DONE Widened the probe's `role="slider"` element from a small 48x48px tip-dot to a full-stage transparent drag surface (with a separate non-interactive decorative dot marking the tip), so pointer drags anywhere on the diagram reliably change `aria-valuenow`; kept the length-c1 handle layered on top for its own independent drag, and adjusted focus-visible styling accordingly.

result:
This looks correct. The slider surface now covers the full stage (well beyond 44x44px at all widths), sits above the SVG for hit-testing, and the small length-handle remains layered on top of it for its own drag area, so both controls stay independently operable.

DONE Widened the probe's `role="slider"` element from a small 48x48px tip-dot to a full-stage transparent drag surface (with a separate non-interactive decorative dot marking the tip), so pointer drags anywhere on the diagram reliably change `aria-valuenow`; kept the length-c1 handle layered on top for its own independent drag, and adjusted focus-visible styling accordingly.
